original: \n\nAvoiding a flurry of blows in a cramped space would be considered a miracle, but you prefer to think of it as an intricate waltz. But, she’s less interested in hurting you than keeping you from escaping. You feint for the door, and she throws herself to block your path. Now it’s your turn.
\n\nThe show of brute force belies her lethal accuracy. You are struck repeatedly under the arms, on the hips, in the sides - a sequence of attacks focused on your body’s tenderest places.
Worse, the rain of blows is so successful that her venom finds open [pc.skinFurScalesNoun], seeping into the bruises and into your bloodstream...!

\n\nAdrenaline pumps coldly through you as you act without thinking, performing the mother of all back-stretching side-steps. A bola-like sphere smashes into the far wall and slumps heavily. You exhale, sweat beading on your [pc.face]. Just being near that thing in motion tells you getting hit by it would be one of the worst things imaginable.
\n\n

A life-or-death thrill flows through your veins as a bola-like projectile smashes against your shield. Like the ball at the end of a chain, the heavy item pinballs off a wall and comes to a slow rest. The sheer kinetic force lingers under your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun], and you limpidly resolve to avoid more of those attacks at all costs.

Rooted by anxiety, you fail to dodge the attack, and something hard, round, and devastating deflects off your skull. Your brain roils with otherworldly visions, unreal things outpacing reality. You stumble back against a wall, struggling to keep it together.
Something that’s very quickly becoming impossible as a wave of chemical enervation seeps into your pores...

\n\nYou don’t have enough vertical to fully clear the batting of her tail, but you can hurdle over its bulk and recover unscathed! As you scramble to your feet, the caesseli ‘overqueen’ withdraws in a bit of a shock. How could that be avoided?
\n\nYou give a little grin.

\n\nAlthough your shield affords you incredible protection, it can’t glue you to the ground. All of her inhuman strength was condensed into the tail-whip that sent you hurtling dramatically into a wall. Somehow, you land on your [pc.footOrFeet]. Fuck, your back...

\n\nToo large, too thick, too strong; all of your opponent’s inhuman strength is focused into a tail-whip that sends you careening into a nearby wall. You land on your ass dramatically. Everything is colors and pain...

\n\nSurvival 101 dictates you avoid dangerous, bitey things. Somehow in the chaos of the fight, you do so, avoiding several hundred pounds of bestial agility and whatever nefarious substance oozes from her fangs!
\n\nThere’s nowhere to run; you go for a deflection, bash with your [pc.weapon] to ward her off, and only end up tangled in an embrace of caresses that leave you unmistakably woozy.

Her fangs are deflected by the blue fizz of your shield, but the barrier does nothing to stop her nimble hands from touching you all over... your chest, your crotch, your butt... there’s no denying that when you finally force her away, you’re a bit more flushed.

Given the size of her fangs and the speed at which she struck, you expect to be suffering unearthly agony right now... and yet there was only a pinch and a cool rush of numbness... paralysis... her mouth pulls away, as do her hands. Pleasurable phantom sensations flare incessantly in your erogenous places.
Things... are getting heavier. Blurrier. You’re acutely aware of the beating of your heart... of the venom pumping through your veins...
\n\nProbably not a good idea to take hits from that now.

\n\nIf she could sweat, which reptiles aren’t meant to do, your naga foe’s body would be drenched in arousal. Right now she seethes with an unearthly desire, wobbling to and fro in a half-obscene half-comedic display. Now you can add ‘snake charming’ to your list of skills!

\n\n...But it’s clear she’s not done fighting. Whether out of a smoldering desire to avenge her humiliation or relieve herself at your expense... she’s able to steady herself. Her weapon is raised. Her teeth extend the whole way. The disadvantage is hers, but something tells you that you better not lose...
Yes
No
\n\nThere’s no malice in her expression. A sudden warmth blooms in your guts.

\n\n“Excsssellent,” the Overqueen purrs, long fingers stroking your jaw. She coaxes you into a more agreeable, sensual state, and letting her do it is... it’s something else. There’s a lovely tingle to it all. “We have much to discuss, now that you are not scurrying back and forth... frustrating my team. I will hear your explanation as to why you’ve trespassed on my grounds, [pc.raceShort]... and then I shall decide where were go from there.”
\n\nHer scaly mass twists a little tighter, but you were waiting for it - you shift a little, avoid the worst sensations... and keep your [pc.hands] unbound.
Something tells you she’s outside her comfort zone. A trained interrogator would be... firmer.
Some interrogation. You aren’t scared of her... but it looks a lot like she’s scared of what you may do!
Typical. As amateurish as the rest here, that a winning move is to simply do nothing.

\n\nThere’s a lack of balance and concentration in her binding. This may be the perfect time to break free. You project stony faced confidence in the very face of danger... and her breasts. It only now occurs to you how soft they look, how small they are... big enough to fill anyone’s hand. For some reason, they’re kind of captivating.
\n\nWhat’re the odds that groping her will get you out of this?
\n\n“Unhand me!” she cries; your gropes send her reeling.

\n\nIn fact, she’s the one who throws you out of her coils! No worse for the wear, you shake off the stupor and retrieve your [pc.weapon]. A hot, wonderful sensation of fearlessness encompasses you. Your opponent, however... looks a little bit flustered.
\n\nIf only scales could blush... oh well. You’ll pretend there’s a red tint on her cheeks!
